creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Samstag, 13. Juni 2009 06:30:17 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of www/mediawiki12,
>
> Please note that PR ports/135531 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135531

This is not the right way to upgrade MediaWiki.

I will take this PR and also 135529 an correct them.

So long...

Gerrit
